hooks.command: conda run --no-capture-output -n fns python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; ti=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}); p=ti.get('file_path') or ti.get('notebook_path') or ''; p.endswith('.py') and (subprocess.run(['isort','-q',p]), subprocess.run(['black','-q',p])); p.endswith('.ipynb') and subprocess.run(['black','-q',p])" 2>/dev/null || true
